# maas_network_interface_tag (Resource)

Provides a resource to manage a MAAS tags as strings on a network interface not managed by Terraform. It is highly recommended to not use this resource to manage tags on network interfaces managed by Terraform. For that, use the nested `tags` attribute on resources such as `maas_network_interface_physical`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `interface_id` (Number) The network interface ID to tag.
- `tags` (Set of String) The tags to assign to the network interface. It should be short and without spaces.

### Optional

- `device` (String) The identifier (system ID, hostname, or FQDN) of the device with the network interface. Either `machine` or `device` must be provided.
- `machine` (String) The identifier (system ID, hostname, or FQDN) of the machine with the network interface. Either `machine` or `device` must be provided.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
